title: Rhytsing 4 Real Wax Ivory Battery Operated Flameless Led Candles with Timer, Realistic Pillar Candles for Christmas and Advent, Batteries and Remote Included - D7.5 x H12.5cm
features: SMOOTH WAX FINISH ADVENT CANDLES - Authentic battery powered candles have a realistic wax appearance. Place them alongside your Christmas wreath, on the dinner table, or mantelpiece to amplify the joyous festive ambiance
WARM WHITE GLOW - 1 LED in each candle and it can fully illuminate the candle body. Good choice for home decoration, wedding, parties, Halloween, Christmas season
8 BUTTONS REMOTE INLCUDED - ON / OFF, 4H / 8H Timer, Candle Flickering / Steady On, Bright / Energy Saving
LONG LASTING BATTERIES INCLUDED - 2 AA alkaline batteries included with each candle. Please be careful to install batteries in the correct polarity
CANDLE SET & DIMENSION - 4 x ivory LED pillar candles, 8 x AA LR6 batteries and 1 x 8-button remote control in a set. Diameter: 7.5cm, Height: 12.5cm
description: Product Description Rhytsing Set of 4 LED Ivory Candles with Remote Product Specifications What do you get: 4 x Ivory Candle, 8 x LR6 AA Battery, 1 x Remote Control Dimensions: Diameter: 7.5 cm, Height: 12.5 cm Material: Real wax, Plastic Description of the Remote Function ON/OFF, 4-Hour Timer/8-Hour Timer, Candle Flickering Light/Steady Light, Brightness +/Brightness - Remark: Please remove the insulation tag before using the remote control.
